message:
feat(connectors): add provisioning automation for 6 more connectors

Implement provisioning recipes, readiness checks, base_url_policy,
and SelfCheckReport for trello (API key+token), snowflake (account+password),
sendgrid (API key), mongodb (connection string), monday (API token),
and mailchimp (API key with datacenter).

~139 new tests across 6 connectors.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
